core_payload.content:
# N1Hub.com: The Runtime for a Sovereign Second Brain

## 1. Role
N1Hub is the active runtime that turns doctrine into lived operation. It now routes that runtime through five bounded sub-hubs so doctrinal meaning, intelligence production, operator surfaces, daemon coordination, and program lines remain explicit instead of collapsing into one 23-link parent directory.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `doctrinal-core` owns existential direction, capsule-generation doctrine, and sovereign capital posture.
- `intelligence-fabric` owns mining, refinery work, and swarm reasoning over graph state.
- `operator-surfaces` owns assistant partnership, chat ingress, control visibility, and graph reading.
- `runtime-coordination` owns daemon continuity, orchestration, agent-lane coordination, and stewardship runtime.
- `program-lines` owns access posture, flagship program lines, and the active sovereign-refactor track.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent N1Hub hub keeps only the top-level relationship to CapsuleOS, To Dig Deep, N1Hub Gold Master, the N1Hub v0 project envelope, and the five runtime sub-hubs. Detailed runtime routing now flows through those sub-hubs so N1Hub remains the living runtime contract for the habitat rather than a flat registry of every adjacent system and strategic line.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N1Hub now acts as a bounded routing hub for five explicit habitat surfaces: doctrinal core, intelligence fabric, operator surfaces, runtime coordination, and program lines. The parent keeps only top-level ties to CapsuleOS, To Dig Deep, N1Hub Gold Master, the N1Hub v0 project envelope, and the five sub-hubs. This makes the runtime easier to inspect because philosophy, cognition, human ingress, daemon continuity, and strategic expansion no longer hide inside one overloaded parent capsule.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: The real N1Hub hub now explicitly owns the live operating contract that already matches current project, agent, and runtime surfaces. Dream remains valuable as future habitat doctrine, but it should no longer be read as the canonical statement of the current runtime.

The operator set short-term project priority on sovereign refactor instead of feature expansion. The real-side N1Hub hub now records that capsule-native refactor of legacy repo truth is the near-horizon runtime program.
Refactored N1Hub into five bounded sub-hubs so doctrinal meaning, intelligence production, operator surfaces, daemon coordination, and program lines no longer collapse into a 23-link parent hub.
